Overview Compare Plans

Reseller Hosting

Launch Your Hosting
Business Today.

Experience unmatched speed and performance with our managed reseller hosting, backed by LiteSpeed, LSCache, and NVMe technology.

Maximize efficiency and cost-effectiveness with our affordable white label hosting, catering to companies and agencies with multiple websites. A carefully crafted solution with performance at its core.

Available in our Atlanta, Seattle & Amsterdam Datacenters.

Get Started

Select Your Reseller Hosting Plan

You Save 50%

Reseller Hosting

Starting at $9.98/mo
Renews at 16.96/mo

  • 40 GB NVMe Storage Space

You Save 50%

Order Now

  • 200 GB NVMe Storage Space
  • 100 cPanel Accounts
  • Unlimited Premium Bandwidth
  • LiteSpeed Included
  • Free SSL Certificates
  • Patchman Included
  • cPanel/WHM Reseller
Compare All Options

* Based on 3 year commitment

Benefits of Reseller Hosting

cPanel/WHM Provided

Every account includes cPanel and WHM, making it easy to create, manage, and support client accounts. Whether you're running an agency, managing multiple stores, or offering hosting as a service. It’s all under your control.

White Label Capable

Brand it your way. Our managed reseller is fully white-labeled, letting you customize cPanel logos or using custom nameservers. Your clients see your brand, not ours.

Resource Isolation

Every cPanel account is provisioned with 2 dedicated CPU cores and 2GB of RAM, secured through CloudLinux isolation. Deliver consistent performance and uptime. No contention, no compromise.

Just The Basics.

Not Your Average Reseller Plan

Our Managed Reseller Hosting is designed for control, branding, and performance. Each client account runs in its own isolated environment. With dedicated resources, stable uptime, and no risk of noisy neighbors.

Providing cPanel/WHM Access, white label branding with CloudLinux isolation reseller-ready features by default. Deliver everything your clients need, from the start.

  • Isolated Resources Per Account
  • Optimized Hosting Environment
  • Free SSL & Daily Backups
  • 100% White-Labeled Environment
  • IPv6 Included by Default

Performance, Delivered

Reseller Hosting that’s stable, scalable, and ready from day one. We deploy every reseller account on NVMe storage, EPYC-powered servers, with LiteSpeed. Ensuring fast, consistent performance for your clients.

With CloudLinux account isolation, each cPanel account operates independently, keeping resources dedicated and uptime dependable. Every layer is built for security, stability, and a performance-driven experience your clients can rely on.

Start strong, scale confidently. Our platform is built to support you.

  • AMD EPYC-Powered Servers
  • Fast NVMe Storage
  • CloudLinux Resource Isolation
  • LiteSpeed with LSCache
  • CloudLinux Resource Isolation

Protection at Every Level

We take security seriously. It's not an add-on, it's part of the design. Every reseller hosting account protected by Imunify360. The combination of real-time malware scanning with a powerful Web Application Firewall ensures that malicious actors don't get by unseen.

By utilizing this powerful security suite, we effectively guard against various threats, including SQL injections and cross-site scripting. Ensuring proactive defense, protecting your websites.

  • Real-Time Malware Scanning
  • Web Application Firewall
  • Proactive Defense
  • Threat Mitigation
  • Brute Force & Injection Protection

Migrate to KnownHost.

Why wait? Migrate today.

Start Now
1

Tell Us You’re Ready

Submit a ticket or use the migration form. We'll gather a few quick details from you—nothing painful.

2

We Handle Everything

Our migrations team copies your site, files, databases, email—everything. We keep your site live and your traffic uninterrupted during the move.

3

You Sit Back & Enjoy

We test your site post-migration, ensuring it runs like it should. Swap when ready. You get better performance, better support and hopefully, less stress. Need DNS Assistance? No problem.

Start Small. Scale Big.

Your Starting Point

Affordable, reliable, and fully managed reseller hosting. Ideal for agencies, marketing professionals, developers, and anyone building a hosting business.

Seamless Scaling

Move from Basic to Premium with zero downtime. Your site stays online and running smoothly while resources are upgraded in the background.

Beyond Reselling

Ready to level up? We’ll help you transition to VPS, Cloud, or Dedicated plans. Fully supported, no guesswork, no disruption.

Never Alone

Wherever you grow, we grow with you. Our team handles the heavy lifting. Migrations, upgrades, configs, and more.

The More Technical Stuff.

cPanel/WHM Provided

Every reseller plan includes WHM. The gold standard in hosting control panels. Easily manage your clients accounts, emails, databases and more as you grow your business.

Multiple Locations

Host where it matters. With data centers in Atlanta, Seattle, and Amsterdam, you can deliver faster load times and better SEO by choosing a server closest to your audience.

Branded for Your Business

Custom nameservers, logo integration, and client-facing controls that reflect your brand, not ours. While cPanel remains, the experience is yours to shape.

We Know Hosting. Period.

We don’t cut corners, let’s be real. Our Reseller Hosting runs on AMD EPYC processors, NVMe storage, and CloudLinux. Paired with LiteSpeed, it delivers the performance and stability you expect. We’ve spent years refining this platform. So your site stays fast, secure, and always online. We ensure the best, because we believe in the best.

Daily Backups

Every plan includes 2-day and 1-week backup retention by default. Powered by JetBackup. No extra cost, no fine print. Want more flexibility? We offer extended backup options to keep your data safe and recoverable.

Optional Add-Ons

Enhance your plan with powerful add-ons. From advanced security to dedicated IPs and client billing automation, these extras help you deliver more to your clients.

  • Patchman Security Scanner – Automatically detects and patches vulnerabilities in popular CMS platforms.
  • Dedicated IPv4 Address – Assign unique IPs to your clients for SSL, branding, or SEO control.
  • WHMCS – Integrate WHMCS with your reseller account to automate billing, account provisioning, and client management.
get started now

Outstanding Support, Available 24/7/365

Assistance available by live chat or ticket.

Whether it’s a quick question or a complex issue, our expert team is always just a message away. Real humans, real help. Anytime you need it.

Waiting? Not here. Typical response as soon as 3 minutes.

We don’t make you wait in line. Our support team is staffed around the clock to jump in fast and get you back on track.

Issues don’t wait. Neither do we.

Emergencies don’t work 9 to 5 and neither do we. No matter when something comes up, we’re ready to solve it, day or night.

Need More Information About
Reseller Hosting?

Reseller hosting provides an interface to allow you to create, manage and sell individualized web hosting packages for your clients. It is a cost effective way to provide that extra level of service for your design or agency clients!

Managed Reseller is beneficial as it can be used for different scenarios such as:

  • Manage individual client websites per account
  • Create staging or development accounts separate from the actual websites
  • No server configuration or maintenance required

Shared hosting can only handle a single domain within its package. It's intended to be used for single websites that don't require a lot of resources. Reseller plans can host multiple domains within its account all handled and controlled from a central location. It's intended to be used for those who require isolated and separate environments for each of their websites.

Yes! Our Reseller plans includes white-label capabilities. You can use your own logo, custom nameservers, and present cPanel with your branding to give clients a seamless, professional experience.

Our Reseller Hosting provides everything that you need to operate your business and/or handle your websites. We provide the panel, we provide the server side optimizations such as LiteSpeed and LSCache. All of this provided to ensure that your getting the best benefits when it comes to Reseller Hosting

Yes. Reseller Hosting lets you create individual cPanel accounts for staging, development, or production—making it easy to manage client workflows or project versions.

We sure do, you're able to create and sell beyond your allocated resources. However, once your package reaches its own limits, you'll either need to reduce usage or update to the next available package.

WHMCS licenses are available as an optional add-on for Reseller Plans. It allows you to automate billing, client management, and provisioning. Making it easier to run your hosting business efficiently.

We will definitely help you migrate to KnownHost's Reseller Hosting. When you're ready to migrate, we will put you in touch with one of our migration specialists who will evaluate your current service and help you evaluate a plan of action in order to migrate your services over to KnownHost.

Should you find yourself outgrowing Reseller Hosting, have no worries! KnownHost provides many other solutions that can be used to move your service over too. With our skilled migration specialists we can assist and handle moving you and your customers websites to another service with as little downtime as possible.

20+ Years of Trusted Hosting

KnownHost has been delivering consistently praised hosting solutions for over 20 years. Backed by glowing customer reviews and a reputation for unmatched support, we’re the trusted choice for businesses that demand reliability.
